reviews.comment:
Amo este sitio. Es parada obligada para mi. Hay espacios verdes.baños limpios. Tienda de alimentos bien provista

(Translated by Google)
I love this place. It's a must-stop for me. There are green spaces, clean restrooms, and a well-stocked grocery store.

reviews.comment:
Hermosa estación de servicio para hacer una parada en el viaje!!! Arboleda y mesas para picar algo y seguir.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful service station to stop on your trip! Trees and tables to grab a bite and continue on your way.

reviews.comment:
Los baños excelentes, mejor que el restaurante más caro. No aceptan MP ni pago virtual. La atención bastante a desgano.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are excellent, better than the most expensive restaurant. They don't accept MP3 or virtual payments. The service is rather lackluster.
